headline: Viatris Announces Several Data Presentations on Investigational Low-Dose Estrogen Combined Hormonal Contraceptive Weekly Patch at the 2026 American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists Annual Clinical & Scientific Meeting
summary: Viatris Inc. (Nasdaq: VTRS), a global healthcare company, today announced that six abstracts on its investigational low-dose estrogen combined hormonal contraceptive (CHC) weekly patch will be presented at the 2026 American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists (ACOG) Annual Clinical & Scientific Meeting (ACSM) in Washington, D.C., May 1-3, 2026.
